description_long: This is a compact black hatchback car with a sleek, modern design and a glossy finish. The vehicle features four passenger-accessible doors, including a rear hatch door, and is equipped with dark-tinted windows and black alloy wheels. The front of the car displays a Peugeot badge and a European-style license plate, while the rear also features the Peugeot logo and matching license plate. The headlights and taillights are streamlined, and the side mirrors are mounted on the doors. The interior appears to have standard seating and dashboard controls, visible through the windows. The car's overall proportions and styling suggest it is designed for urban environments, offering practicality and maneuverability.
description: A sleek black Peugeot hatchback car with four doors, glossy finish, and modern styling, ideal for urban use. Features include tinted windows, alloy wheels, and visible front and rear license plates.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, two doors, black wheels, and tinted windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the Peugeot badge, headlights, and front license plate.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, two doors, and the rear taillight cluster.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the Peugeot logo, taillights, rear hatch door, and rear license plate.
